arabic:
وعن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏كفى بالمرء كذبًا أن يحدث بكل ما سمع‏"‏‏.‏ (‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "It is enough for a man to prove himself a liar when he goes on narrating whatever he hears.".

chapter.english: The Book of the Prohibited actions
